def format_tags(tags: list[str]) -> str:
    return ", ".join([tag.lower() for tag in tags])


def build_query_string(params: dict[str, str]) -> str:
    return "&".join([f"{k}={v}" for k, v in params.items()])


def create_csv_row(values: list[str]) -> str:
    return ",".join([str(v) for v in values])


def format_user_list(users: list[dict]) -> str:
    return "\n".join([f"{u['name']} <{u['email']}>" for u in users])


def join_paths(base: str, segments: list[str]) -> str:
    return "/".join([base] + [s.strip("/") for s in segments])
